What We Offer

Our Services

AI-powered IT solutions to grow your brand, automate your workflows, and drive measurable results — saving you time and money.

Core Infrastructure & Engineering

Enterprise-grade systems architecture, cloud migrations, and server management.

Cloud Migration & ArchitectureEnterprise Server MaintenanceSystem Administration (Linux/Win)Custom Software DevelopmentNetwork Security & OptimizationAPI & App Integration

AI Automation & Modernization

Modernize legacy workflows with cutting-edge AI ecosystems and automation.

Custom AI Chatbot EcosystemsBusiness Workflow AutomationInternal Knowledge Custom GPTsAI-Powered Process OptimizationLegacy System Modernization

Scale your reach with AI-driven content generation across every digital platform.

Creative & Branding

Build a memorable brand with stunning visuals and compelling corporate stories.

Request a Quote

Proof of Excellence

Case Studies

Real-world problems solved with enterprise-grade engineering and intelligent AI modernization.

Eliminating 99% System Downtime

Problem

Legacy monitoring and fragmented server architecture leading to frequent outages.

Solution

Implemented a unified Zabbix monitoring ecosystem and high-availability server clusters.

Impact

Reduced critical downtime by 99.4% within the first quarter.

AI-Driven Workflow Automation

Problem

Manual data entry or document processing consuming 40% of operational hours.

Solution

Deployed custom AI-powered document parsers and automated routing using OpenAI API.

Impact

10x faster processing speed and 0% human error in data extraction.

Seamless Global Cloud Migration

Problem

Inefficient on-premise infrastructure causing latency for international branches.

Solution

Migrated 200+ servers to AWS/Azure using a zero-downtime phased approach.

Impact

40% reduction in infrastructure costs and instant global accessibility.

The Expertise

Personal Branding Meets
Corporate Trust

I am Rajeev Upadhyay, an Infrastructure Support Engineer and the founder of Softcorp Group LLC. With over 6 years of hands-on experience in managing global IT infrastructure, I build systems that scale with authority.

Having executed critical projects under industry giants likeTCS and supported global organizations likeSwissport and Air Liquide, I understand the non-negotiable nature of uptime, security, and professional communication.

My academic foundation from BHU Varanasi combined with years of enterprise troubleshooting allows me to bridge the gap between legacy reliability and modern AI-driven innovation.

Academic Rigor

Post Graduate in Computer Science from the prestigious BHU Varanasi.

Corporate Standard

Project execution experience at TCS, mastering global SLAs and workflows.

High-Stakes IT

Managing complex infrastructure for Swissport, Air Liquide, and Tata.

AI Modernization

Leading the transition from legacy systems to intelligent AI ecosystems.

How It Works

Our Process

A proven, transparent workflow that keeps you informed at every stage.

01

Discovery & Consultation

We begin with a deep-dive conversation to understand your brand, goals, audience, and competition. This shapes a tailored strategy.

02

Strategy & Planning

Our team crafts a comprehensive plan including content calendar, platform selection, ad budgets, and KPI targets.

03

Execution & Launch

We produce high-quality content, launch campaigns, and begin active community engagement across your chosen channels.

04

Optimize & Report

Continuous monitoring, A/B testing, and monthly performance reports ensure we maximize your ROI at every step.
